name: First Citizens BancShares Inc. 5.625% Non-Cumulative Perpetual Preferred Stock Series C
summary: First Citizens BancShares Inc. 5.625% Non-Cumulative Perpetual Preferred Stock Series C represents preferred shares in First Citizens BancShares Inc., a financial holding company. These preferred shares offer a fixed dividend rate of 5.625% and have a preference over common stock in dividend payments and liquidation. The company is headquartered in Raleigh, North Carolina.
